form.formComment: Last start set the pace for much of the race 2nd of 9 at Wagga Bm82 on March 29 over 1400m, on a slow track; 3 len behind The Shaper carrying 57.5kg at $8.50. The run before that second last of 7 at Kembla Grange Cond Bm68 on March 3 over 1400m, on heavy track; 4 len behind Mosgold with 60.5kg at $18. Has ability and can take this out.

form.formComment: Third-up today. First-up raced on the speed throughout before fading second last of 10 at Wyong Bm72 on March 18 over 1200m, on a slow track; 7 len behind Caesar carrying 57.5kg at $8. Second run from a spell ran last of 9 at Warwick Farm Bm72 on April 1 over 1200m, slow going 4.5 len behind Call Me Gorgeous carrying 57.5kg at $41. Can turn things around.

form.formComment: First-up. Finished off last preparation second of 8 at this track Cond Bm68 November 8 over 2000m, a neck behind Call Me Magnifique carrying 56kg at $4.60. Previously first up; ran last of 8 at Gosford Mid Cl1 June 19 over 1000m, soft track; 17 len behind Sunday Tycoon carrying 55kg at $91. Prefer to see how he returns.

form.formComment: Dual acceptor. Resuming. Not seen since winning by 2.75 len this track Mdn December 14 over 1600m slow track defeating Kumbaya with 57.5kg at $4.40. On debut ran last of 8 at Gosford Mdn-Sw November 11 over 1200m, 11 len behind Just Response with 57.5kg at $21. Talented gelding who can sprint well fresh with the two solid trials, go close.

form.formComment: Back after a long spell. Finished off last campaign eased back early on 5th of 9 at this track Cl1 on September 6 over 1300m, 7 len behind Sarrismo with 56.5kg at $14. When resuming last campaign 5th of 8 at Warwick Farm 2yo Mdn on April 2 2025 over 1300m, slow going 2.25 len behind Is It Spectacular carrying 57kg at $9. Finished seventh in a Rosehill trial over 900m on April 2. Has claims if presented on song.

form.formComment: Second run back. First-up after five months second last in a small field at Goulburn Cl1 on March 22 over 1300m, on a slow track; 5.5 len behind Hazel Jean carrying 61kg at $10. Previously second-up 5th of 9 at Goulburn Cl1 on August 24 over 1400m, on heavy track; 3.5 len behind Socrazyinlove with 58.5kg at $5.50. Best chance in a long time to find the winner's circle.
